_comment: AgentKit Claude Code settings template. Copy relevant sections into your .claude/settings.json

_notes.AGENTKIT_HOME: Set this env var to the absolute path of your AgentKit install dir
_notes.UserPromptSubmit: Runs the skill router on every user message — classifies task, injects relevant skills
_notes.PreToolUse: Forced-eval hook — reminds Claude to apply active skills before Edit/Bash/Write
